mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INTERVIEW_SESSIONS ( SESSION_ID, MEMBER_ID, RESUME_CONTENT, JOB_CATEGORY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sessionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{jobCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT DETAIL_ID, SESSION_ID, QUESTION_TEXT, USER_ANSWER, AI_EVALUATION, SCORE, SORT_ORDER FROM INTERVIEW_DETAILS WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
